2b7a4549ee1b7a3d633c9058872f2908814ba03b.justification: The three tests cover the required scenarios (default params, user_ids filter, STABLE marker), but the script lacks BEGIN; and a single SELECT plan(3); — instead it has three separate plan(1)/finish() blocks which is non-standard pgTAP usage and would cause errors in a CI runner. Also, `function_is` with a volatility argument is not a real pgTAP function (correct would be `volatility_is`), and `has_rows` is not a standard pgTAP function either.

2e54243e50802156711edd6928e381b1f7152ffd.justification: The document has most structural elements but deviates significantly from the required structure: sections are renumbered/renamed (e.g., 'Implementation Details' replaces 'Обратная совместимость', 'Security' is missing entirely, 'Risks' is a separate section 8 instead of part of Migration plan), the required 9-section order (Motivation, Проблема, Proposed API with sub-sections 3.1-3.4, Обратная совместимость, Performance, Security, Alternatives, Migration plan with Phases 0-3 + R1-R3, Open questions ≥5) is not followed, and Open Questions has only 3 items instead of ≥5. The H1 title also differs from the required 'RFC-0042: Structured-context propagation в @ourcorp/logger'.
